page_metadata.biotools__summary: A Functional Analysis Tools for Post-translational Modifications (FAT-PTM) database, which supports data from publicly available proteomic analyses encompassing eight different types of PTMs and over 49,000 PTM sites.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A Functional Analysis Tools for Post-translational Modifications (FAT-PTM) database, which supports data from publicly available proteomic analyses encompassing eight different types of PTMs and over 49,000 PTM sites.
